---
title: "SOP Updates Slides Template"
type: template
last_reviewed: 2026-05-01

tags: [template, training, change-management]

---

1. Utilize the [SOP Update Slides Template](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1RrxJn8mXzs1r6za0Wi1WZTenqJLXXZC-PF6b6C9yPFk/edit?usp=sharing) to answer:

   
   1. What SOP is changing?
   2. Who is responsible for executing this SOP?
   3. When is training for this procedure?
   4. When is staff expected to begin executing new procedure?
   5. Why is this change being implemented?
   6. How will we track success? What KPI or Customer Service Metric is expected to improve?
